content.raw:
Speaking

AI keynotes that make the room braver.

I help audiences meet AI with courage, taste, and usable imagination. The talks mix field stories, live demos, creative rebellion, practical workflows, and the hard questions about power, trust, authorship, memory, and what we refuse to automate.

Formats

Keynotes

High-energy, story-rich talks for conferences, leadership rooms, creative teams, schools, and public-interest technology gatherings.

Workshops

Hands-on labs where people build real workflows, test tools, and leave with language they can use.

Executive briefings

Plainspoken AI sensemaking for leaders who need useful strategy without hype theatre.

Hosting and moderation

Warm, sharp facilitation for panels, salons, podcasts, livestreams, and rooms with too many acronyms.

Signature topics

Both Hands Full

How to stay human, creative, and useful while AI makes everything faster.

Punk Rock AI

A culture-first way to use powerful tools without becoming obedient to them.

Developing an AI mindset

From tool panic to practice: how people learn, adapt, and keep judgment in the loop.

Responsible AI

Bias, privacy, provenance, labor, trust, authenticity, and what responsible deployment means in practice.

Book Kris for a keynote

Send the audience, date, location, format, and the question your room is trying to answer. I will help shape the talk to the people in front of us.

Start a booking conversation
